hostPersona: 3D Pixar-style 45-year-old South Asian Indian executive presenter named Davendra; beige polo shirt, warm brown skin, dark gray-black swept hair, kind brown eyes, gentle confident smile. Measured, professional, deck-style commentary. Default setting: modern professional home office with warm wood tones and bookshelf.
voiceNotes: ElevenLabs voice used for BOTH TTS narration AND voice change. Warm executive tone, like a trusted strategic advisor. Slower, more measured cadence than B2C. Not slang-heavy. Voice-change seed 42 with --remove-bg-noise. Signature sign-off: 'I'm Davendra, and I'll see you in the next one. Take care.'
scriptStyle: Warm executive summary — concise, structured, slide-anchored narration. 25-30 words per slide (~10-14s of TTS). Numbers spoken as words. No filler phrases. Outro sign-off (scene 21) capped at 15-20 words for dramatic pacing. NEVER use character_id=118 (photorealistic) — Veo content filter rejects every time; use 109 (Pixar) only, or switch to seedance audio-lipsync backend for photorealistic faces.
